remediation_results.http_client: NetworkAgentClient.export_rates implemented with stdlib urllib only; inert unless allow_network=True (fails before opening); constructor requires non-empty base URL + token, http/https scheme, no query/fragment, positive timeout; injectable opener (defaults to urllib.request.urlopen)
remediation_results.http_mock_assertions: mocked opener verified: method POST; URL {base}/mt5/history/rates/export; headers X-GuvFX-Agent-Token + Content-Type/Accept application/json; exact request bytes; configured timeout passed; exactly one call (no retry); response.close() called; returns exact body
remediation_results.http_limits_and_redaction: non-200 status raises TransportError without body; response read capped at max_response_bytes+1 (oversize raises, no body); HTTPError/URLError/timeout translated to redacted TransportError with no token/body; repr redacts token
remediation_results.no_egress: tests run inside network_blocked() egress guard with fake openers; zero real sockets/HTTP; socket.create_connection raises inside guard
remediation_results.strict_json: strict_json_loads rejects invalid UTF-8, invalid JSON, and NaN/Infinity/-Infinity via parse_constant; no body in error messages; orchestrator uses it
remediation_results.non_finite_prices: validate_response rejects non-finite open/high/low/close via math.isfinite
remediation_results.schema_bounds: runtime enforces source/account slug <=64, broker/server reported <=128, terminal build <=64; regex validators confirm string type first and raise ContractError (no TypeError leak). NOTE deviation: timezone evidence_method/dst_behaviour <=256 runtime check NOT added because research/market_data/timezone.py is outside the section-6 authorised-modify list; the committed broker_timezone_evidence_v1 schema already enforces maxLength 256 for both fields.
remediation_results.malformed_prohibited_key: raw malformed bytes are scanned for quoted prohibited JSON key tokens (password|token|secret|api_key|login|account_number, case-insensitive, optional ws before colon) BEFORE ordinary quarantine; on match -> digest-only security_stop (no request/response body persisted) + ProhibitedKeyError with generic message; a value occurrence is not treated as a key (tested)
remediation_results.idempotency: land() returns ALREADY_PRESENT only when BOTH stored request_sha256 and response_sha256 match; result built from the stored manifest (digests + root-relative paths), never current-call claims; returned checksums verified equal to sha256 of the files at the returned paths
remediation_results.request_byte_conflict: non-canonical request_bytes (request_bytes != canonical_json_bytes(request)) are quarantined; accepted raw byte-for-byte unchanged
remediation_results.response_byte_conflict: same request_id with changed response bytes quarantined; accepted raw unchanged
remediation_results.quarantine_identity: quarantine id is sha256(request_bytes\0response_bytes\0reason)[:16]; distinct request bytes produce distinct quarantine directories (no aliasing); existing quarantine dir returns stored manifest values
remediation_results.fail_closed_manifest: a missing/corrupt/incomplete accepted manifest raises StorageError (fails closed) rather than claiming idempotency or overwriting
remediation_results.notion_titles: GFX-EVD-006B and GFX-ADR-DATA-004 replaced with exact authoritative titles; GFX-EVD-006C, GFX-PKT-006C-R1 and GuvFX — Current State v0.20 added

expected_results: All R1 remediation behaviours implemented and unit-tested
No real network egress; HTTP client exercised only via mocks inside the egress guard
Existing research + market-data tests remain green; smoke deterministic
Only authorised files changed; no dependency/schema/CI/Make change
All five CI jobs pass for C3 and C4 push + PR runs
actual_results: market-data tests: Ran 64 tests, OK (adds HTTP client, strict-JSON/bounds, malformed-key, idempotency/quarantine exactness)
research foundation: OK; synthetic smoke: deterministic byte-for-byte across two runs
check_no_secrets: no findings; make governance-check OK; make research-check OK; make market-data-check OK
git diff --check clean; only the 12 authorised files changed (timezone.py was reverted to keep within the authorised list)
C3 CI: push 28057248675 + PR 28057251546 (head 792731d) — governance/backend/frontend/research-foundation/market-data-foundation all success; C4 final runs recorded in PR comment + handoff
limitations: No real client call, agent endpoint, market data, NAS or credentials: the HTTP client is inert by default and was exercised only through injected fakes inside the egress guard.

Deviation: the timezone evidence method/DST 256-char runtime bound (one sub-item of finding 7.2) was not added because research/market_data/timezone.py is not in the authorised-modify list; the committed schema already enforces maxLength 256, so this is a defense-in-depth gap only. PM may authorise timezone.py in a tiny follow-up.
Backend 'core' test still relies on the GitHub backend CI job locally (no backend/.venv/PostgreSQL); unchanged from 006C.
head_commit/c3_commit point at C3 (792731d); the C4 block is filled at the evidence-only C4 commit after C3 runs concluded success; C4 triggers further CI recorded in the PR comment/handoff.
The 006C evidence manifest historical record is unchanged.
